requirement_topic.en: BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) — Mandatory Pre-Customs Certification for Imported Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: BPS进口商品检验放行（ICC）——进口电冰箱的强制性海关前认证
requirement_topic.zht: BPS進口商品檢驗放行（ICC）——進口電冰箱的強制性海關前認證

summary.en: Household refrigerators imported into the Philippines fall under a Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) technical regulation and require an Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) before customs release and sale. The ICC is issued by BPS under the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) on a per-shipment basis once the product is shown to conform to the applicable Philippine National Standards (PNS IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, and the energy requirements administered with DOE). The ICC sticker must be affixed to each unit. The importer of record — a Philippine-established entity — applies for the ICC, submits test reports acceptable to BPS, and is the responsible party for conformity. Locally manufactured equivalents instead carry the Philippine Standard (PS) Quality/Safety Certification Mark. There is no recognition of foreign certification marks (including China CCC) as a substitute for ICC or PS.
summary.zh: 进口至菲律宾的家用电冰箱属于菲律宾标准局（BPS）技术法规范围，在海关放行和销售前须取得进口商品检验放行（ICC）。ICC由贸易工业部（DTI）下属BPS在产品被证明符合适用的菲律宾国家标准（安全方面为PNS IEC 60335-2-24，能效要求与DOE协同管理）后按批次签发。ICC标贴须加贴于每台产品。进口记录方——一家在菲律宾设立的实体——负责申请ICC、提交BPS可接受的检测报告，并作为合规责任方。本地生产的同类产品则加贴菲律宾标准（PS）质量/安全认证标志。外国认证标志（包括中国CCC）不被承认为ICC或PS的替代。
summary.zht: 進口至菲律賓的家用電冰箱屬於菲律賓標準局（BPS）技術法規範圍，在海關放行和銷售前須取得進口商品檢驗放行（ICC）。ICC由貿易工業部（DTI）下屬BPS在產品被證明符合適用的菲律賓國家標準（安全方面為PNS IEC 60335-2-24，能效要求與DOE協同管理）後按批次簽發。ICC標貼須加貼於每台產品。進口記錄方——一家在菲律賓設立的實體——負責申請ICC、提交BPS可接受的檢測報告，並作為合規責任方。本地生產的同類產品則加貼菲律賓標準（PS）質量/安全認證標誌。外國認證標誌（包括中國CCC）不被承認為ICC或PS的替代。

standards_or_laws: BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) — mandatory per-shipment certification for products under a BPS technical regulation, administered by BPS/DTI
Philippine Standard (PS) Quality/Safety Certification Mark — for locally manufactured units (licensing scheme)
Republic Act No. 4109 (Standards Law) and DTI Department Administrative Orders — BPS product certification framework
PNS IEC 60335-2-24 (safety) and DOE MEPS/energy-label requirements — technical basis assessed for ICC issuance

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus a separate China Energy Label (based on GB 12021.2) administered by NDRC/SAMR. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification issued by CNCA-designated certification bodies and is keyed to the Chinese domestic market. CCC is not a per-shipment import clearance — it certifies the model — and it is not recognised by Philippine BPS. A Chinese exporter cannot present a CCC certificate to clear customs in the Philippines; an ICC obtained by a Philippine importer is required instead.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并另须取得由NDRC/SAMR管理的中国能效标识（基于GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定认证机构签发的强制性第三方认证，针对中国国内市场。CCC并非按批次的进口清关——它认证的是型号——且不被菲律宾BPS承认。中国出口商不能凭CCC证书在菲律宾清关；须改由菲律宾进口商取得ICC。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並另須取得由NDRC/SAMR管理的中國能效標識（基於GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定認證機構簽發的強制性第三方認證，針對中國國內市場。CCC並非按批次的進口清關——它認證的是型號——且不被菲律賓BPS承認。中國出口商不能憑CCC證書在菲律賓清關；須改由菲律賓進口商取得ICC。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR; domestic-market certification, not an import clearance
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: This is a structural market-access gap: (1) No CCC reciprocity — BPS does not accept China CCC as a substitute for ICC; the model must be assessed against PNS IEC 60335-2-24 and Philippine energy requirements with test evidence acceptable to BPS. (2) Importer-driven process — the ICC is applied for by a Philippine-established importer of record on a per-shipment basis; a foreign manufacturer cannot obtain it directly without a Philippine importer. (3) Per-unit ICC sticker — each cleared unit must carry the ICC sticker; goods arriving without ICC are held at customs (Manila MICT/South Harbor, Subic). (4) Documentation package — application typically requires test reports (BPS-recognised lab or accepted CB/ILAC reports), product technical details, importer registration, and proof of conformity to the applicable PNS; CB Scheme reports may streamline but do not replace ICC issuance.
gap.zh: 这是一项结构性市场准入差距：（1）无CCC互认——BPS不接受中国CCC作为ICC的替代；型号须依据PNS IEC 60335-2-24及菲律宾能效要求并以BPS可接受的检测证据进行评估。（2）由进口商主导的流程——ICC由在菲律宾设立的进口记录方按批次申请；外国制造商在无菲律宾进口商的情况下不能直接取得。（3）逐台ICC标贴——每台放行产品须加贴ICC标贴；无ICC的货物将被滞留海关（马尼拉MICT/南港、苏比克）。（4）文件包——申请通常需要检测报告（BPS认可实验室或被接受的CB/ILAC报告）、产品技术细节、进口商登记及符合适用PNS的合规证明；CB体系报告可简化流程但不能替代ICC签发。
gap.zht: 這是一項結構性市場准入差距：（1）無CCC互認——BPS不接受中國CCC作為ICC的替代；型號須依據PNS IEC 60335-2-24及菲律賓能效要求並以BPS可接受的檢測證據進行評估。（2）由進口商主導的流程——ICC由在菲律賓設立的進口記錄方按批次申請；外國製造商在無菲律賓進口商的情況下不能直接取得。（3）逐台ICC標貼——每台放行產品須加貼ICC標貼；無ICC的貨物將被滯留海關（馬尼拉MICT/南港、蘇比克）。（4）文件包——申請通常需要檢測報告（BPS認可實驗室或被接受的CB/ILAC報告）、產品技術細節、進口商登記及符合適用PNS的合規證明；CB體系報告可簡化流程但不能替代ICC簽發。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) required before customs release and sale of imported refrigerators; PS Mark for locally manufactured units; administered by BPS/DTI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; CCC is domestic-market and not an import clearance

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS), Department of Trade and Industry (DTI)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) is a mandatory hard gate for refrigerators imported into the Philippines; China CCC is not recognised as a substitute. A Philippine importer of record must apply for the ICC on a per-shipment basis, submit BPS-acceptable test evidence against PNS IEC 60335-2-24 and the energy requirements, and affix the ICC sticker to each unit before customs release.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BPS进口商品检验放行（ICC）是进口至菲律宾的电冰箱的强制性门槛；中国CCC不被承认为替代。菲律宾进口记录方须按批次申请ICC，提交针对PNS IEC 60335-2-24及能效要求的BPS可接受检测证据，并在海关放行前为每台产品加贴ICC标贴。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BPS進口商品檢驗放行（ICC）是進口至菲律賓的電冰箱的強制性門檻；中國CCC不被承認為替代。菲律賓進口記錄方須按批次申請ICC，提交針對PNS IEC 60335-2-24及能效要求的BPS可接受檢測證據，並在海關放行前為每台產品加貼ICC標貼。

requirement_topic.en: Philippine Importer of Record and Supply-Voltage Verification (230 V 60 Hz) — Responsible Local Entity
requirement_topic.zh: 菲律宾进口记录方及供电电压核验（230 V 60 Hz）——本地责任实体
requirement_topic.zht: 菲律賓進口記錄方及供電電壓核驗（230 V 60 Hz）——本地責任實體

summary.en: Placing imported household refrigerators on the Philippine market requires a Philippine-established importer of record who applies for the BPS ICC, holds the conformity documentation, and is the responsible economic operator for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation with BPS/DTI and DOE. The importer is identified on import documentation and is accountable for corrective action if a product is found non-compliant. In addition, the appliance must be engineered and rated for the Philippine electrical supply of 230 V, 60 Hz — which differs from China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz. The rating plate, plug type, compressor and motor selection, thermal protector, and energy/performance data must all reflect 230 V 60 Hz operation. A model designed and tested only for the Chinese 50 Hz grid cannot be assumed to perform or comply at 60 Hz without verification.
summary.zh: 将进口家用电冰箱投放菲律宾市场须有一家在菲律宾设立的进口记录方，由其申请BPS ICC、持有合规文件，并作为产品合规及与BPS/DTI和DOE进行市场监管协作的责任经济运营商。进口商在进口文件上标明，并在产品被认定不合规时负责采取纠正措施。此外，器具须按菲律宾230 V、60 Hz的电力供应进行设计和额定——这与中国的220/380 V、50 Hz不同。铭牌、插头类型、压缩机和电机选型、热保护器以及能效/性能数据均须反映230 V 60 Hz运行。仅按中国50 Hz电网设计和检测的型号不能在未经核验的情况下默认在60 Hz下正常运行或合规。
summary.zht: 將進口家用電冰箱投放菲律賓市場須有一家在菲律賓設立的進口記錄方，由其申請BPS ICC、持有合規文件，並作為產品合規及與BPS/DTI和DOE進行市場監管協作的責任經濟運營商。進口商在進口文件上標明，並在產品被認定不合規時負責採取糾正措施。此外，器具須按菲律賓230 V、60 Hz的電力供應進行設計和額定——這與中國的220/380 V、50 Hz不同。銘牌、插頭類型、壓縮機和電機選型、熱保護器以及能效/性能數據均須反映230 V 60 Hz運行。僅按中國50 Hz電網設計和檢測的型號不能在未經核驗的情況下默認在60 Hz下正常運行或合規。

standards_or_laws: BPS/DTI import requirements — importer of record applies for ICC and holds conformity documentation
DTI / Bureau of Customs import documentation requirements — responsible importer identification at ports (Manila MICT/South Harbor, Subic)
PNS IEC 60335-2-24 and DOE energy requirements — verified for the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply (vs China 220/380 V 50 Hz)

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export manufacturer to designate a destination-country importer of record responsible for product compliance and market surveillance cooperation; this is a commercial arrangement in practice. Under the domestic CCC regime the certificate holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market only. On supply conditions, China's grid is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, and GB 4706.13 / GB 12021.2 testing is conducted on that basis. There is no Chinese requirement that products be additionally verified for a 230 V 60 Hz grid, so export models must be separately engineered and re-verified for Philippine conditions.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定要求出口制造商指定一名负责产品合规及市场监管协作的目的国进口记录方；这在实践中是商业安排。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人仅为中国市场的责任方。在供电条件方面，中国电网为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz，GB 4706.13/GB 12021.2检测以此为基准。中国没有要求产品额外针对230 V 60 Hz电网进行核验的规定，故出口型号须针对菲律宾条件单独设计并重新核验。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定要求出口製造商指定一名負責產品合規及市場監管協作的目的國進口記錄方；這在實踐中是商業安排。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人僅為中國市場的責任方。在供電條件方面，中國電網為220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz，GB 4706.13/GB 12021.2檢測以此為基準。中國沒有要求產品額外針對230 V 60 Hz電網進行核驗的規定，故出口型號須針對菲律賓條件單獨設計並重新核驗。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for a destination-country importer-of-record obligation
China grid basis: 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz — basis for GB 4706.13 and GB 12021.2 testing

gap.en: Two gaps with no clean Chinese analogue: (1) Importer of record — a Chinese manufacturer selling into the Philippines must work through a Philippine-established importer who applies for the ICC, holds conformity documents, and acts as the responsible local entity for BPS/DTI and DOE; the manufacturer cannot self-clear goods. (2) Voltage/frequency engineering — the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply differs from China 220/380 V 50 Hz in both voltage and frequency. Frequency affects induction-motor and fixed-speed compressor running speed and capacity; voltage affects insulation and component rating. The rating plate, plug, compressor/motor, thermal protector, and the energy figures on the DOE label must all be verified at 230 V 60 Hz. A model certified only for the Chinese grid must be re-engineered or re-verified before it can be safely and lawfully sold in the Philippines.
gap.zh: 两项在中国没有清晰对应的差距：（1）进口记录方——向菲律宾销售的中国制造商须通过一家在菲律宾设立的进口商运作，由其申请ICC、持有合规文件，并作为BPS/DTI和DOE的本地责任实体；制造商不能自行清关。（2）电压/频率工程——菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电在电压和频率上均与中国220/380 V 50 Hz不同。频率影响感应电机和定速压缩机的运行转速及能力；电压影响绝缘和元件额定。铭牌、插头、压缩机/电机、热保护器及DOE标签上的能效数据均须在230 V 60 Hz下核验。仅按中国电网认证的型号在能够安全合法地在菲律宾销售前须重新设计或重新核验。
gap.zht: 兩項在中國沒有清晰對應的差距：（1）進口記錄方——向菲律賓銷售的中國製造商須通過一家在菲律賓設立的進口商運作，由其申請ICC、持有合規文件，並作為BPS/DTI和DOE的本地責任實體；製造商不能自行清關。（2）電壓/頻率工程——菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電在電壓和頻率上均與中國220/380 V 50 Hz不同。頻率影響感應電機和定速壓縮機的運行轉速及能力；電壓影響絕緣和元件額定。銘牌、插頭、壓縮機/電機、熱保護器及DOE標籤上的能效數據均須在230 V 60 Hz下核驗。僅按中國電網認證的型號在能夠安全合法地在菲律賓銷售前須重新設計或重新核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Philippine importer of record is required to obtain the ICC and act as responsible local entity; rating and conformity must reflect the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine supply
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent importer-of-record requirement under Chinese law; Chinese testing is on a 220/380 V 50 Hz basis

source.publisher: Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese refrigerator manufacturers must work through a Philippine importer of record to obtain the BPS ICC and serve as the responsible local entity for BPS/DTI and DOE. Additionally, the appliance must be engineered and verified for the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply, which differs from China 220/380 V 50 Hz — the rating plate, plug, compressor/motor selection, and DOE energy figures must reflect 230 V 60 Hz operation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电冰箱制造商须通过菲律宾进口记录方取得BPS ICC，并作为BPS/DTI和DOE的本地责任实体。此外，器具须按菲律宾230 V 60 Hz供电进行设计和核验，该供电与中国220/380 V 50 Hz不同——铭牌、插头、压缩机/电机选型及DOE能效数据均须反映230 V 60 Hz运行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電冰箱製造商須通過菲律賓進口記錄方取得BPS ICC，並作為BPS/DTI和DOE的本地責任實體。此外，器具須按菲律賓230 V 60 Hz供電進行設計和核驗，該供電與中國220/380 V 50 Hz不同——銘牌、插頭、壓縮機/電機選型及DOE能效數據均須反映230 V 60 Hz運行。
